name: Chili (Crockpot)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds ground beef, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the Crockpot in the order listed. Stir once.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 10-12 hours or High for 5-6 hours.
Notes:
Added 1 can tomato paste to thicken this up as it was quite watery. Also added 4 adobo chilies the second night as we found it wasn't hot enough for our taste.
